title: Gooey Charred British Fruits Spotted Dick
description: A traditional British dessert with a twist, featuring charred and gooey fruits, black cardamom pods, and a plant-based friendly spotted dick, perfect for a romantic evening
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large mixing bowl, combine the suet, flour, and brown sugar
Add the dried fruits, black cardamom pods, and lemon juice to the bowl and mix well
Gradually add the apple cider and non-dairy milk to the bowl, stirring until a dough forms
Wrap the dough in a clean cloth and steam for 2 hours
Remove the spotted dick from the cloth and place on a baking sheet
Char the spotted dick under the broiler for 2-3 minutes, or until golden brown
Serve the spotted dick warm, topped with additional dried fruits and a drizzle of non-dairy milk
